page_metadata.biotools__summary: Model-based statistical software package for identifying population sub-division and assigning individuals to populations, on the basis of their genotypes at co-dominant marker loci. The underlying population genetic model is appropriate for out-crossing diploid organisms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Model-based statistical software package for identifying population sub-division and assigning individuals to populations, on the basis of their genotypes at co-dominant marker loci. The underlying population genetic model is appropriate for out-crossing diploid organisms.
